code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut found = false
mut last = ""
mut i = 0
let n = lines.len()
while i < n
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(string.trim(line))
      last = line
      found = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println("#{last}")
else
  println("(none)")
end
